jd_text: We are supporting a fast-growing FinTech platform building an AI-integrated credit infrastructure that enables ecosystems and marketplaces to unlock the full potential of embedded financing for SMEs and consumers . The platform leverages AI, Machine Learning, and Predictive Modelling to drive smarter, faster, and fairer credit decisions , powering next-generation financial ecosystems. About the Role We are looking for a Head of Growth to build and scale the company’s growth engine across acquisition, activation, retention, partnerships, and revenue . This role sits at the intersection of product, data, and business , and requires someone who can combine strategic thinking with hands-on execution . Key Responsibilities Growth Strategy & Ownership Own and drive the end-to-end growth strategy across all funnels Identify scalable growth levers across product, marketing, and partnerships Define and track key metrics including CAC, LTV, conversion, and retention Product-Led Growth Work closely with Product and Engineering to drive PLG initiatives Optimize onboarding, engagement, and user journeys Run continuous experimentation (A/B testing) to improve performance User Acquisition & Performance Marketing Build and scale multi-channel acquisition strategies (paid, organic, partnerships) Optimize campaigns with a strong ROI focus Drive consistent pipeline growth across segments Partnerships & Ecosystem Growth Identify and close strategic partnerships with platforms, marketplaces, and ecosystem players Unlock embedded finance opportunities through integrations and collaborations Drive distribution-led growth Data & Analytics Build a strong data-driven growth culture Define dashboards, KPIs, and reporting frameworks Use insights to continuously refine growth strategies Leadership & Execution Build and lead a high-performing growth team Work closely with Founders and cross-functional teams Operate with high ownership in a fast-paced environment What We’re Looking For 8–15 years of experience in Growth / Product Growth / Marketing , preferably in FinTech / SaaS / AI-led companies Strong understanding of embedded finance, credit ecosystems, or lending platforms Proven track record of scaling products and driving measurable business outcomes Experience with data analytics, performance marketing, and experimentation frameworks Strong business acumen with exposure to revenue ownership and partnerships Ability to balance strategy with hands-on execution Startup experience is highly preferred Why This Role? Opportunity to build the growth engine from 0 → scale Work on cutting-edge AI-driven FinTech products High ownership with direct exposure to leadership Fast-paced, execution-driven environment
